question: What are the benefits of assigning work tasks to a group, rather than to an individual? Choose five answers
options: a) Group members can avoid task which are nearing SLA breach
b) Group members can pick task based on the SLA urgency
c) Site support members can pick task based on location
d) Groups can assign task to users based on on-call schedules
e) Group can assign task to users based on skills
f) Groups can assign task to user based on availability
g) Group members can pick task, based on highest priority
h) Group members can choose their preferred task from my groups works
answer: b) Group members can pick task based on the SLA urgency, d) Groups can assign task to users based on on-call schedules, e) Group can assign task to users based on skills, f) Groups can assign task to user based on availability, g) Group members can pick task, based on highest priority

question: Access controls are evaluated in this order: 1. Match Object against table ACL 2. Match The object against field ACL. Within step one above, what order are the table ACLs evaluated?
options: General to specific: table ACL, table.field ACL, parent table. field ACL
Specific to general: table.field ACL, parent table.field ACL, * Field ACL
Top to bottom: wildcard table ACL, parent table ACL, table ACL
Bottom to top: table ACL, table. field ACL, parent table. field ACL
Specific to general: table ACL, parent table ACL, wildcard(*) ACL
answer: Specific to general: table ACL, parent table ACL, wildcard(*) ACL

b) click list magnifier to expand column search, on short description, type email, click enter
c) click list magnifier to expand column search, on short description, type %email, click enter
d) click list magnifier to expand column search, on short description, type *email, click enter

question: A task worker asks how they can monitor any updates occurring to records assigned to him, like responses from customers. what do you suggest?
options: a) on my work list, select activity stream icon to show a frame with live updates
b) select service desk> my work dashboard
c) open an agent workspace tab for each record he wants to monitor
d) click on the eyeglass icon to expand the monitor frame

question: Which workflow would you update to make the change to require approval for any request that totals over $1500?
After you create a new table, what is the best practice regarding the navigation pane? Choose 2 answers
options: a) create application menu with the same name as the table label
b) set the font style on both the application menu and the module
c) specify which roles are able to see the module
d) set the filter condition on the application module
e) Create module with the plural of the table label
f) specify which roles are able to see the application menu
answer: a) create application menu with the same name as the table label, e) Create module with the plural of the table label

question: What Icon do you use to change the label on your favorite?
What is the platform name for the group table?
From a form, what would you Click to modify the order of the fields on the form? Choose 2 answers
options: a) context menu> configure> form layout
b) context menu> configure> form designer
c) right click on header> configure> form design
e) right click on header> configure>UX dashboard
answer: a) context menu> configure> form layout, b) context menu> configure> form designer

question: On access control definitions, what are ways you can set the permissions on a table? Choose 3 answers
options: c) script that sets the answer variable to true or false
answer: a) Groups, b) Roles, d) CRUD
